transactions.title: Company Transactions
transactions.noCompany: Select or register a company to record transactions.
transactions.noTransactions: No transactions recorded for this period.
transactions.valueMustBePositive: Value must be greater than zero
transactions.removeTransactionConfirmation: Do you want to remove this transaction? This action cannot be undone.
transactions.categoryClassificationDescription: Define whether each category is essential or optional for quick decisions.
transactions.noBreakdown: Register transactions to see the distribution across categories.
transactions.categoryManagementDescription: Create, edit, or remove custom categories for your transactions.
transactions.removeCategoryConfirmation: Do you want to remove this category? Transactions using it will become uncategorized. This action cannot be undone.

fixedCosts.title: Fixed Costs

fixedCosts.noCompany: Select or register a company to manage fixed costs.

fixedCosts.fixedCostSaveError: Could not save the fixed cost
fixedCosts.confirmDelete: Do you want to remove this fixed cost?
fixedCosts.fixedCostRemoveError: Could not remove the fixed cost
fixedCosts.dueDayHelp: Day of the month when the cost is due (1-31). Reminders will be sent 5, 3 and 1 day(s) before.
fixedCosts.invalidDueDay: Due day must be between 1 and 31

chat.balanceQuestion: How much do I have available?
